mizerMR marker classes

Source: R/mizerMR-class.R
mizerMR-class.Rd

S4 marker subclasses of MizerParams and MizerSim that enable S3 dispatch for MR-specific methods.

Details

Objects of class mizerMR are created by setMultipleResources(). Objects of class mizerMRSim are returned automatically by project() when called on a mizerMR params object.

Developed by Gustav Delius, Romain Forestier.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
